examples: Objective To observe and evaluate the clinical effect of the Jiliu soup for treating myoma of uterus (MU).
There was higher systolic peak and lower blood vessel resistance in denatured uterine myoma than in non denatured uterine myoma.
Conclusion MRI can evaluate the volume changes, necrosis and the blood supply of the post-UAE myoma, and guide the clinical treatment and decide the response of treatment.
